title: 本书设置
completionRule: Complete only when favorite, rating, reading direction, page mode and horizontal-book overrides preserve the source-evidenced controls and defaults, distinguish inherited and explicit values, apply atomically to the active session, persist through the canonical NeoView data boundary, migrate legacy localStorage without creating a second business store, roll back failed updates, and have GUI/CLI/TUI, lifecycle, responsive and performance evidence.

sourceUiInventory.title: 书籍身份、空态与加载态
acceptanceItems: bookInfo path 作为旧设置身份
迟到结果不得覆盖新书

sourceUiInventory.title: 阅读方向分段控制
acceptanceItems: 切换后当前双页顺序立即更新

sourceUiInventory.title: 单双页显示模式
acceptanceItems: 切换后 frame 立即重建
单页与双页不改变资源 URL 身份

sourceUiInventory.title: 横版本子开关
acceptanceItems: 横版语义与宽页单页策略明确
不创建第二套页面配对算法

sourceUiInventory.title: 旧设置键、默认值与规范所有权
acceptanceItems: 坏 JSON 降级空对象
不得写入 xiranite.db Reader 业务表

sourceUiInventory.title: 通用 Card 外壳与紧凑布局
acceptanceItems: Settings 图标与本书设置标题

items.title: 使用规范书籍身份定位覆盖
items.targetContract: Per-book overrides use the canonical opened book identity and never an editable path field, transient page URL or display title.
items.notes: The React Card receives the active session book but the canonical persistent book key is not yet exposed.

items.title: 查看和切换本书收藏
items.targetContract: Favorite is a shared per-book boolean with inherited, explicit true and explicit false semantics and immediate optimistic feedback with rollback.
items.notes: Current React intentionally omits the control because no canonical read/write contract exists.

items.title: 编辑本书五星评分
items.targetContract: Rating supports unset and integers 1..5 through one shared book metadata contract without diverging from Folder rating fields.
items.notes: Current React intentionally omits the five-star control until rating ownership is unified.

items.title: 覆盖本书阅读方向
items.targetContract: Left-to-right and right-to-left update the active frame immediately, persist as a per-book override and can be reset to inherit the global default.
items.notes: The authenticated session options route now strictly accepts direction, rebuilds the frame and reverses double-page presentation order; canonical per-book persistence and reset-to-inherit remain pending.

items.title: 覆盖本书单双页模式
items.targetContract: Single and double page mode update the active frame immediately, persist only for this book and can be reset to inherit the global default.
items.notes: The React Card updates the current session page mode, but does not distinguish or persist a per-book override.

items.title: 覆盖横版本子策略
items.targetContract: Horizontal-book is mapped to one documented wide-page/frame policy, applies immediately and does not create a parallel pairing algorithm.
items.notes: The legacy boolean has no canonical XR behavior yet.

items.title: 立即应用、串行提交与失败回滚
items.targetContract: Each settled control change updates one active session, serializes persistence, ignores obsolete responses and restores the last confirmed value on failure.
items.notes: Direction and page-mode changes serialize inside the Card, disable both groups while pending and surface failure without changing the confirmed controlled value; persistence revision conflicts and cross-book cancellation remain pending.

items.title: 空、加载、继承、显式、保存与错误状态
items.targetContract: No-book, loading, inherited, explicit, saving, failure and retry states preserve the last confirmed override without stale cross-book publication.
items.notes: No-session is zero DOM in the shared Card host; the current component lacks inherited, saving and failure states.

items.title: 共享有界本书覆盖 DTO
items.targetContract: GUI, CLI and TUI share one versioned bounded override DTO with optional fields, strict enums/ranges, revision conflict handling and no raw local paths in remote output.
items.notes: The legacy localStorage record is not a valid shared XR contract.

items.title: 迁移旧键并持久化规范覆盖
items.targetContract: Legacy neoview-book-settings imports once into the compatible NeoView business database or canonical config ownership, saves atomically, supports reset-to-inherit and never creates Reader business tables in xiranite.db.
items.notes: Current React neither reads nor writes the legacy record; final ownership must be resolved before controls are exposed.

items.title: 切书、折叠、取消与关闭释放
items.targetContract: Hidden/unmounted Cards do no work; switching books cancels obsolete reads/writes; session close releases pending updates and stale responses cannot affect the next book.
items.notes: The Card is lazy and no-session renders zero DOM; persistent request cancellation is not implemented.

items.title: 复用通用 Card 外壳
items.targetContract: Book Settings remains independently lazy, hideable, collapsible, movable, resizable and window-capable in the Properties Panel.
items.notes: The shared registry and Card shell own layout behavior; content remains independently lazy.

items.title: 命名控件、分组与键盘等价操作
items.targetContract: Every toggle, star and segmented option has an accessible name, pressed/checked state, keyboard operation, pending semantics and focus preservation after save or rollback.
items.notes: Direction and page-mode buttons expose pressed and disabled state through native buttons and failures use an alert; favorite, rating, horizontal-book and full rollback focus evidence remain absent.

items.title: 保持旧版五行紧凑布局
items.targetContract: Favorite, rating, direction, display mode and horizontal-book retain the legacy order, labels, compact density and responsive two-column geometry at desktop and 420x360 widths.
items.notes: Direction and display-mode rows preserve the legacy order and compact segmented geometry without overflow in desktop and 420x360 Chromium; favorite, rating and horizontal-book rows remain pending.

items.title: 设置更新不重挂活动媒体
items.targetContract: Metadata-only changes issue no media request; frame-affecting direction/page-mode changes reuse stable asset URLs and replace media nodes only when the visible page set actually changes.
items.notes: Real Chromium proves RTL reorders the same two visible asset URLs after double-page activation; metadata-only controls and duplicate-request counts remain pending.

items.title: 常量 DOM、零隐藏工作与独立 chunk
items.targetContract: The Card uses O(1) DOM, no polling or media decode, zero hidden work and an independent deferred chunk under 8 KiB outside Reader entry and sidebar base chunks.
items.notes: The Card builds as an independent 3,213-byte deferred chunk and performs no polling or decode; a dedicated chunk budget and explicit collapsed zero-work request count remain required.

items.title: 记录覆盖继承与旧 localStorage 替代
items.targetContract: Document reset-to-inherit, canonical persistence, authenticated session updates and any horizontal-book mapping as XR extensions while preserving all five legacy controls.
items.notes: Unsupported controls are deliberately hidden rather than presented as no-op; final replacement contracts remain pending.
